resume.name: SHENWEI ZOU
resume.summary:
Full-stack JavaScript engineer focused on front-end development, skilled in building scalable React applications and Node.js services.
Experienced in independently leading projects with strong engineering and solution design skills. Committed to writing maintainable, high-quality code and following best practices.
Passionate about staying up to date with emerging technologies and able to learn new tools and frameworks quickly.

projects.name: Lumio
description: Lumio is an enterprise-grade fundraising SaaS platform that provides powerful fundraising features and tools, supporting multiple fundraising methods and scenarios.
Developed a user-friendly drag-and-drop visual page editor with multiple templates and components to simplify NGO fundraising page creation.
Built the CMS management system with Next.js 14 (App Router) + Puck Editor.

projects.name: Exapay
description: Exapay is a decentralized payment gateway solution that offers secure, high-performance, and scalable on-chain payment capabilities, supporting multi-chain and multi-asset payment scenarios.
Implemented Smart Contracts based on the ERC-2535 Diamond standard, enabling an upgradeable and extensible architecture to reduce maintenance costs.
Built the Dapp as a full-stack application using Next.js 14 (App Router) + Nest.js.

projects.name: TransactionTracker
description: A high-performance transaction monitoring and indexing system designed for EVM-compatible chains.
Supports Ethereum, BSC, Polygon mainnets and testnets.
Implemented an event-driven architecture, enabling flexible subscription to transactions, blocks, contracts, and log events.
Real-time capture of transactions, logs, and block data with low-latency indexing; easily extensible to new chains and custom monitoring strategies.

projects.name: ednesdayW
descriptions: ednesdayW: A high-performance headless UI component library built with React 19 and Next.js 15, offering a variety of reusable components.
Built on Radix UI for accessibility foundations and styled with Tailwind CSS 4.0 for a highly customizable design system.
Supports multiple variants and size configurations, full style customization, and slot patterns to meet diverse design requirements.

projects.name: Gabriel AI
descriptions: Gabriel AI is a real-time cryptocurrency data analytics platform built with Next.js and Nest.js.
Integrated Binance Exchange API to deliver intelligent market analysis services.
Supports spot and futures market flow comparison, anomaly detection, and trend forecasting
Users can perform real-time AI-driven data analysis via the frontend chat interface and automatically generate scheduled market analysis reports.

projects.name: Crypto Invoice
descriptions: A full-stack cryptocurrency invoice generation and management system built with Next.js 15.
Supports multi-chain and multi-currency payments, covering the entire workflow from invoice creation to PDF export.
Provides freelancers, businesses, and startups with a fast, secure, and elegant solution for crypto invoicing.
Implemented server-side rendering with Puppeteer to enable high-quality PDF invoice export.

projects.name: erc2535-hardhat
descriptions: A production-grade smart contract implementation based on the EIP-2535 Diamond Standard, built with a modern tech stack.
Implemented a modular and upgradeable smart contract architecture using the Multi-Facet Proxy pattern (Diamond Standard).

projects.name: create2-benchmark
descriptions: A high-performance CREATE2 address generation engine designed for payment projects, enabling fast wallet address generation on EVM or Tron networks with specific suffixes.
Implemented a multi-language performance benchmarking framework (Rust, Go, JavaScript/TypeScript).
Achieves 50 million address predictions in 5.4 seconds (Rust GPU version).

projects.name: Pathfinding
descriptions: A high-performance A* pathfinding system implemented in the Minecraft 3D game environment.
Focuses on solving complex path planning problems in 3D space, providing intelligent autonomous navigation for game entities.
